svg:

💡 What You Can Do✨ LoKO Sets Up Everything🚀 Start Here loko config generate📝 Config Createdloko.yaml with defaults✏️ Edit as NeededAdd workloads, customize settings⚡ One Commandloko create☸️ Kubernetes ClusterMulti-node Kind cluster🌐 DNS Resolution*.dev.me auto-resolves🔒 TLS CertificatesWildcard HTTPS certs📦 Container RegistryLocal OCI registry🔌 Intelligent Port RoutingTCP/HTTP auto-routed🎉 Everything Just Works!🗄️ Access Servicespsql -h postgres.dev.mevalkey.dev.me:6379🌐 Deploy Web Appshttps://myapp.dev.me💻 Develop Your AppUse databases, caches,messaging, etc.📦 Push Images/Chartsdocker push cr.dev.me/myapphelm push chart.tgz oci://cr.dev.meGeneratesOptionalRunAutomaticAutomaticAutomaticAutomaticAutomatic
